name: tts-cpp
description: Text-to-speech inference in pure C++/ggml. Ships Resemble Chatterbox (Turbo + Multilingual variants) and Supertonic engines under a unified Engine API. Sourced from tetherto/qvac-ext-lib-whisper.cpp's tts-cpp/ subfolder. This pin brings QVAC-21118 [TTS GGML] chunk-streaming CFM-step floor (PR #62): for the Multilingual model's standard 10-step CFM the streaming path floors a low stream_cfm_steps to n_timesteps, fixing the saturation/clipping + per-chunk wobble (batch --cfm-steps knob and Turbo meanflow untouched). This pin is master HEAD 1cc2d383 (PR #62). Layered on a679c7e7 (QVAC-19557 chatterbox iOS-memory: streamed GGUF loads + selectable KV-cache dtype) and the b95ad447 base (QVAC-20616 EOS robustness PR #53 + QVAC-20557 Supertonic Android GPU PR #54). Consumes the ggml-speech port.
